tasks.subject: Task 0: Pure per-turn motion engine (turn-motion.js)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure, deterministic, zero-import public/js/ui/turn-motion.js exporting buildTurnTimeline (§3.1 Phase schedule) + isClutchSave (panic-window predicate), barrel-wired in public/js/ui.js, fully unit-tested.

**Files:** Create public/js/ui/turn-motion.js; Modify public/js/ui.js (append 1 barrel line after L18); Test client-tests/turn-motion.test.js (NEW, pure direct-require + fs barrel-wiring assertion + timer-panic boundary-agreement).

**Acceptance Criteria:** buildTurnTimeline ordered handoff→think→submit→reveal→impact, indices 0..4, atMs running-sum, non-think durMs frozen 400/250/600/500, think.durMs=caller thinkMs (omitted/non-finite/≤0→0), impact.meta.clutch=!!input.clutch; isClutchSave boundary-correct (invalid→false, non-finite secs→false, valid&≤5→true, valid&6→false, negative clamps to 0→true); zero-import/deterministic/zero-identity; barrel re-exports it; isClutchSave agrees with timer-panic.js timerSeverity 'panic' band at 4/5/6s.

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-7 && npx jest client-tests/turn-motion.test.js → pass; then cd C:/mm-phase7-7 && npx jest → full green (62/≈510).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/turn-motion.js", "public/js/ui.js", "client-tests/turn-motion.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-7 && npx jest client-tests/turn-motion.test.js && npx jest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["buildTurnTimeline §3.1 schema: order/indices/atMs running-sum/frozen non-think durMs/caller think/impact.meta.clutch", "isClutchSave boundary-correct (invalid→false, non-finite→false, valid≤5→true, valid 6→false, negative clamps→true)", "zero-import, deterministic, zero-identity sentinel", "public/js/ui.js re-exports turn-motion (7.6 barrel lesson)", "isClutchSave agrees with timer-panic.js timerSeverity 'panic' band at 4/5/6s", "full npx jest green (additive over 61/500 baseline)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Filmstrip render + behavioural-equivalence guard rewrite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Transform renderChainItems into the length-aware Constellation filmstrip (reel of poster nodes + labeled actor bridges + glowing now-playing hero + full-width full-name all-member ungated cast panel + best-effort burned stamp), append structural CSS, rewrite render-chain.test.js to pin the new contract with enumerated §4 axes 4.1–4.8. Settled/static render only (choreography is Task 2).

**Files:** Modify public/js/ui/ui-render.js (renderChainItems body only — L618-727; nothing else changes); Modify public/css/03-game.css (append-only at EOF after L488, 7.7 structural block incl. the one existing-breakpoint 767px layout @media); Rewrite client-tests/render-chain.test.js.

**Acceptance Criteria:** §4.1 every entry→.reel-node in order; §4.2 linking actor on .reel-bridge + .now-cast-link 'linked via'; §4.3 last=.reel-node.now-playing; §4.4 .now-cast-list every member FULL names no abbrev no expand; §4.5 .reel-burned-stamp only when entry.eliminated===true (absent on normal data); §4.6 zero stableId/identity in #chain-display; §4.8 empty-board hint + stale-banner cleanup preserved + showGameOverBanner banner NOT clobbered; showGameOverBanner/renderGame game-over branch/renderLobby/team byte-identical; 03-game.css append-only no new colour; index.html unchanged; all non-rewritten guards + server/** byte-identical & green.

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-7 && npx jest → full green; git diff 20f4c95 -- public/index.html empty; git diff 20f4c95 -- public/js/ui/ui-render.js only renderChainItems.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "public/css/03-game.css", "client-tests/render-chain.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-7 && npx jest && git -C C:/mm-phase7-7 diff 20f4c95 -- public/index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["§4.1 every chain entry → a .reel-node in chain order", "§4.2 linking actor on .reel-bridge + .now-cast-link 'linked via'", "§4.3 last entry = .reel-node.now-playing; .now-cast-title = latest", "§4.4 .now-cast-list every member, FULL names, no abbreviation, no expand/+N-more gate; tolerates {id,name}|string", "§4.5 .reel-burned-stamp/.burned only when entry.eliminated===true (absent on normal data — no fabrication)", "§4.6 zero stableId/socket-id/identity in #chain-display innerHTML", "§4.8 empty-board hint + stale .game-over-banner cleanup preserved; showGameOverBanner's appended banner NOT clobbered by a re-render; chain-reset clears filmstrip", "showGameOverBanner + renderGame game-over branch + renderLobby/team paths byte-identical; index.html unchanged", "03-game.css append-only at EOF, no pre-existing rule edited, no new colour, only the existing 767px layout @media", "full npx jest green; all non-rewritten guard suites + server/** byte-identical"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Per-turn choreography + Clutch Save + mobile wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drive the now-playing node's per-turn choreography via buildTurnTimeline (single leak-safe setTimeout-chain handle, reduced-motion/no-matchMedia → instant settled), fire the Clutch Save burst when isClutchSave is true off the existing timer/panic state (no socket/protocol change), append compositor-only motion CSS (neutralized by the existing global reduced-motion * block — no new motion @media), extend the guard suite for the wired contract.

**Files:** Modify public/js/ui/ui-render.js (additive markClutchSave()/cancelTurnMotion() exports + choreographTurn helper called inside renderChainItems); Modify public/js/socketClient.js (1 additive clutch block on the playing edge + 2-symbol barrel import); Modify public/css/06-states-anim.css (append-only at EOF after L1238, 7.7 motion block); Modify client-tests/render-chain.test.js (append wired-contract describe blocks).

**Acceptance Criteria:** jsdom/reduced-motion → settled end-state no timers, §4 still holds; markClutchSave() → now-playing .clutch + one .clutch-flash for that render only (flag consumed); never otherwise; animated path single cancellable setTimeout handle, cancelTurnMotion leak-safe (getTimerCount 0 after cancel+rAF); socketClient change additive only (no renderGame signature/socket/protocol change; 7.6 recap+Daily blocks byte-identical); 06-states-anim.css append-only compositor-only NO new @media NO new colour.

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-7 && npx jest → full green; git diff 20f4c95 -- public/js/socketClient.js only additive block; git diff 20f4c95 -- public/css/06-states-anim.css only appended block.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "public/js/socketClient.js", "public/css/06-states-anim.css", "client-tests/render-chain.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-7 && npx jest && git -C C:/mm-phase7-7 diff 20f4c95 -- public/js/socketClient.js public/css/06-states-anim.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reduced-motion/jsdom (no matchMedia) → instant settled end-state, zero scheduled timers; §4 axes still hold", "markClutchSave() → now-playing node gets .clutch + exactly one .clutch-flash for that render only; flag consumed (no replay on idempotent re-render)", "no clutch flag → never any .clutch/.clutch-flash", "animated path: single module-level cancellable setTimeout handle; cancelTurnMotion() leak-safe (jest.getTimerCount()===0 after cancel + rAF drain) — recap-player.js precedent", "socketClient.js: ONE additive clutch block + 2-symbol import; no renderGame signature change, no new socket event, no protocol change; 7.6 recap one-shot + Daily blocks byte-identical", "06-states-anim.css append-only at EOF, compositor-only transform/opacity, NO new @media (existing global * reduced-motion block neutralizes), NO new colour", "full npx jest green; all non-rewritten guard suites + server/** byte-identical"]}
```
